pattern: Grow a sorted prefix one node at a time, scanning it from the front to find each incoming node's insertion point and relinking it there.
hints: Build the answer as a separate sorted list: take the original nodes one by one and drop each into its correct spot among the nodes already placed.
Keep a dummy head for the sorted portion; for each incoming node, walk the sorted list from the front until the next node's value would exceed it, then splice it in there.

Remember the next node to process before you relink the current one, otherwise you lose the rest of the unsorted list; start each search from the dummy (or reuse position when values are nondecreasing).

edge_inputs.description: strictly descending forces a full insert each step
duplicates remain together and stable in value order

stress.description: random list near the length cap, full range of values
